user.title: Dreame Zone Queue
user.description: Select your Dreame vacuum entity. Rooms are configured later in the integration options.

add_room.title: Add room
add_room.description: Zone coordinates in map units (mm). Read them e.g. from Xiaomi Vacuum Map Card (zone cleanup mode).

data.cleaning_mode_select_entity: Cleaning mode select entity (default: derived from vacuum)
data.wait_wash_between_rooms: Wait for mop washing between rooms
data.task_status_sensor: Dreame task_status sensor (default: derived from vacuum)

bulk_edit.title: Bulk edit rooms (YAML)
bulk_edit.description: All rooms as one YAML document. Edit and submit to replace the whole set. {error_detail}

import_dreame.title: Import rooms from Dreame
import_dreame.description: Copies room names and bounds from the dreame-vacuum map. Leave the camera empty to auto-detect.

detect_rooms.title: Detect rooms from Dreame
detect_rooms.description: Reads room outlines from the dreame-vacuum map camera and creates zones (bounding boxes). Merge keeps your existing rooms.

error.name_exists: A room with this name already exists.
error.invalid_rooms_yaml: Invalid rooms YAML — details shown above the form.
error.no_dreame_rooms: No rooms found in the Dreame entities. Make sure the map camera works and the map is loaded.
error.no_rooms_found: No rooms found — check that the map camera entity has a 'rooms' attribute.
error.zone_too_small: The zone is smaller than 120 mm on one side — the robot rejects such zones.
